patch.value:
## Context
From memory session 2026-06-01: 'SDK first-class importer/exporter registration (pm-7qjk: registerImporter/registerExporter optional 3rd options arg → full command def+flags)'

docs/SDK.md line 478: 'registerImporter(name, importer) and registerExporter(name, exporter) register...'
docs/SDK.md line 493: shows registerImporter with only 2 args
docs/SDK.md line 516: shows registerExporter 'jsonl' with only 2 args

The 3rd options argument (command definition with flags) is not shown in any SDK.md example.

## Acceptance criteria
- SDK.md registerImporter/registerExporter section shows the optional 3rd arg with a command-definition example
- The example includes at minimum: command name, flags, description
- The pm-beads or pm-todos pattern is cited as a first-party reference implementation

## Evidence
docs/SDK.md lines 478-520; docs/examples/starter-extension/index.js lines 160-165 (only 2-arg form); memory note 2026-06-01 pm-7qjk
Add importer/exporter options arg and command-def examples to SDK.md

PR #94 (2026-06-01) added an optional 3rd options argument to registerImporter/registerExporter enabling full command definition with flags. SDK.md has a basic registerImporter/registerExporter section (around line 478-520) but does not show the options arg for command definition, which is the primary use case for first-party packages like pm-beads and pm-todos.

- SDK.md registerImporter/registerExporter section shows the optional 3rd arg with a command-definition example
- The example includes at minimum: command name, flags, description
- The pm-beads or pm-todos pattern is cited as a first-party reference implementation
